network.name: Default Extended Rules
network.description: Catch-all policy for affiliate patterns in settings.json not covered by network-specific policies

rules.reason: Booking.com affiliate tracking — non-Rakuten publisher AIDs only
Branded go.* affiliate redirect domains (go.redirectingat.com covered by rakuten policy)
Direct partner program domains not covered by direct-retailers policy
Partnerize tracking domain (Aera Smart Home Fragrance)
Partnerize tracking domain (Martha Stewart Wine Co.)
Partnerize tracking domain (Moosejaw / Mountain Steals / StockX)

metadata.notes: Catch-all policy for patterns not covered by network-specific policies. Includes: CJ variants, Pepperjam merchant subdomains, direct affiliate programs, Booking.com non-Rakuten AIDs, and ~170 Partnerize merchant tracking domains (merchant.XXXX.net format). Amazon Associates rules removed in v5. Partnerize camref/clickref param rules removed in v7.

network.name: Awin
network.description: Awin affiliate marketing network (formerly Affiliate Window)

metadata.notes: Awin acquired ShareASale and operates both brands

network.name: Commission Junction (CJ)
network.description: CJ Affiliate by Conversant - one of the largest affiliate marketing networks

metadata.notes: CJ uses multiple obfuscated domains for click tracking. All variations should be detected.

network.name: Direct Retailer Affiliate Programs
network.description: Retailers operating their own in-house affiliate programs

rules.reason: Hotwire partner program (may also use other networks)
Best Buy affiliate tracking — requires both ref (excluding Rakuten ref 6467161) and acampID parameters
Best Buy direct affiliate program via Impact
Hotels.com Capital One venture affiliate path

metadata.notes: These are retailer-specific affiliate programs, not network-based. Some retailers may also participate in multiple affiliate networks.
metadata.documentation: Various - see individual retailer partner/affiliate pages

rules.reason: eBay SEM paid-referral traffic: matches any eBay TLD subdomain with at least one of mkevt, mkcid, or campid params (accepts both ? and & as param separator, covers all eBay subdomains)

metadata.notes: Pattern covers all eBay TLD variants and subdomains (www, cart, signin, etc.). Accepts ? or & before affiliate params to handle first-param-in-querystring case. Matches any of mkevt, mkcid, or campid. See EBTOOL-7174 (eBay paid-referral requirement) and EBTOOL-7432 (false-positive incident with ebay.com/sch/i.html).

rules.reason: Standard affiliate source standdown parameter injected by affiliate networks on destination URLs

metadata.notes: afsrc is a cross-network signal that appears on destination URLs regardless of which affiliate network managed the redirect. It is not tied to any specific network domain.
Google Affiliate Network was shut down in 2013. The gan.doubleclick.net rule may be legacy. The /aclk rule was removed in policy v3 due to negative production impact.

network.name: Impact
network.description: Impact affiliate marketing platform (formerly Impact Radius)

metadata.notes: Impact uses many dynamic tracking domains. The i######.net pattern covers merchant-specific tracking domains.

network.name: Rakuten Advertising (Linkshare)
network.description: Rakuten Advertising affiliate network, formerly known as Linkshare

network.name: Miscellaneous Affiliate Services
network.description: Various affiliate link services and platforms

rules.reason: Bing Rebates affiliate redirect — affiliate network URL encoded in murl= param

metadata.notes: Collection of various affiliate services that don't fit into major network categories
ShareASale is part of Awin Group
VigLink is now part of Sovrn Commerce
